title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6, Jinbe, Perospero, Luffy as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sophis is the other side, huh... it's pretty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She's a fine ship, this one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Green Room" is the short-lived space made inside the crest of a breaking wave. A wave room!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fishman children love playing in it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're coming out now! Hold on!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A fine ship and a fine Navigator.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: With the right steering, this ship's invincible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's controlling this sloop like it's just an extension of himself!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: I've never seen a Helmsman like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were just about to invade the ship, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: has sunk to the bottom of the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT-?! That's strange, sister. The other side of this mirror doesn't look like it's underwater.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nami! Luffy can't come back here anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up. Break them all. All the mirrors on board.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to interfere with Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let me focus on this guy!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
